title: Everbuild Black Jack Strong Self Adhesive Flashing Tape – Natural Lead-Look Finish – 450mm x 10m
availability_text: Only 3 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ECONOMICAL – Cost-effective solution for replacing lead flashing. Because it's not made of lead, it also reduces the chances of theft.
SELF-ADHESIVE – No need for additional glue, the self-adhesive forms simply by pressing the tape into place by hand.
VERSATILE – Bonds quickly to roof ridges and insulating materials. Suitable for the repair of lead gutters, general flashing, repairs cracks in concrete.
LONG-LASTING – Provides a strong, durable, waterproof seal.
MULTIPLE WIDTHS – Available in widths of 75mm, 100mm, 150mm, 225mm and 450mm making it suitable for a wide range of applications.
MULTIPLE LENGTHS – In addition to multiple widths and 10-metre length, the tape is also available in 3-metre lengths. Please note that not all widths are available in the 3-metre length.
description: From the manufacturer Before application, all surfaces must be dry, sound and free from oil, grease and dust. Remove all loose material by scraper or wire brush. Porous surfaces, such as concrete or brick, should be primed using Black Jack Bitumen and Flashing Primer and allowed to dry. Cut the Black JackFlashing Tape to the required length. Peel back approximately 5cm of release back cover and place the tape into position. Continue removing the release back cover whilst firmly placing the tape to avoid unnecessary creasing. Ensure intimate contact and that no air is trapped. Using a small roller ensure that all edges and overlaps are sealed properly. Overlaps should be at least 25mm.
